THIS PROBLEMATIC INFINITI QX60 HAD FAILED ONCE AGAIN WHILE I WAS ON THE HIGHWAY.  IT'S JUST DEAD AND THE ENGINE REFUSED TO START.  I HAD TO CALL THE TOW TRUCK TO DROP OFF AT THE KINGS INFINITI AUTO SHOP FOR REPAIR.        FIRST, IT WAS A HUGE INCONVENIENCE THAT THEY COULDN'T TAKE

narrative.headline: What 2018 Infiniti Qx60 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 37 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
